GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [nation_count@1 DESC, r_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[nation_count@1 DESC, r_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[r_name@0 as r_name, count(*)@1 as nation_count]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[r_name], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([r_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[r_name], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(r_regionkey@0, n_regionkey@0)], projection=[1]
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=792
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=80, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
  GpuSortExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=80, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=80, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=80, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=72
              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=72
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=36, estimate_cost=36
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=4, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=4, estimate_cost=4
